targets.query: from(bucket: "sensors") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "anomalies") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "anomaly_score")
from(bucket: "sensors") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "anomalies") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "is_anomaly") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1) |> count()
from(bucket: "sensors") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "anomalies") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
from(bucket: "sensors") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "anomalies") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "soil_moisture")
